apiUrl.description: Base URL of the EverMemOS HTTP API. Inside the openclaw container this is usually http://host.docker.internal:1995 (host.docker.internal resolves to the host machine when the container is run with --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway).

apiKey.description: Optional bearer token. Local deployments leave empty.

syncMode.description: Send sync_mode=true on POST /api/v1/memories so the server waits for boundary detection before returning.

retrieveMethod.description: Retrieval method passed to /api/v1/memories/search (e.g. keyword | hybrid | vector).
